title: Petslucent Cat Scratching Board, Corrugate Cat Scratcher for Indoor Cats with Box, Scratch Pad with Catnip, Cardboard Double-Sided Usability (2 PCS)
features: 【Cat Scratching Pad】 Petslucent cat scratcher will keep your cat entertained for hours while providing physical and mental exercise. cat scratching is an instinct. Scratching boards help cats groom and trim their claws, stretch and flex their muscles, and burn off energy on a daily basis. You can help your cat stay active and healthy.

【 Protection of Furniture】 This cardboard cat scratchers is great for attracting your cat's attention, providing the right place for your cat's scratching needs and protecting your furniture from claws. cat scratcher cardboard helps reduce scratching on furniture and is useful for both you and your cat. scratch pad for cats protects your upholstery, screen doors, leather sofas, car door panels and woodwork from cat claws.

【Claw resistant &Long-lasting】 Scratch pads are both durable and replaceable. Each corrugated scratch pad is made of flexible corrugated cardboard that can withstand considerable scratching force. Thanks to the high-density upgraded cardboard, fewer pieces of cardboard will come off when the cat scratches.

【Reversible Design&Double Life】 Made from corrugated cardboard, this scratch pad pro is designed to make quality pet supplies for animals. However, when one side wears out, simply pull back the back panel to reveal a new side for your pet to scratch. Wherever possible, we use only eco-friendly, recyclable and sustainable materials.
【100% Satisfactory After-Sales Service】 Please contact us if you are not satisfied with our sofa cat protectors tape, We will give you a satisfactory solution!
